new.name: lenovo-a1000g-mt8317-A412_01_09_130907-kernel-3.4.0-root-cve-2016-5195
new.description: [AI-assisted] Root method for Lenovo IdeaTab A1000G (MT8317, kernel 3.4.0, Android 4.1) via CVE-2016-5195 (Dirty COW)

new.name: CVE-2026-40887
new.description: An unauthenticated SQL injection vulnerability exists in the Vendure Shop API. A user-controlled query string parameter is interpolated directly into a raw SQL expression without parameterization or validation, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary SQL against the database.

new.name: Blind-SSRF-to-Remote-Code-Execution-Shellshock-Professional-Bug-Bounty-Report
new.description: This repository contains a professional bug bounty report demonstrating the successful exploitation of a Blind SSRF vulnerability that reached an internal CGI endpoint vulnerable to Shellshock (CVE-2014-6271). Remote command execution was confirmed using an out-of-band (OAST) DNS callback, showcasing the complete attack chain, technical analysis.

new.name: kernel-exploit-dirtycow
new.description: Lab — Privilege Escalation via Dirty Cow CVE-2016-5195 | 4Geeks Academy

new.name: IoT-Firmware-Reverse-Engineering
new.description: Reverse engineered IoT camera firmware and discovered CWE-78 command injection, DirtyCOW CVE-2016-5195, weak authentication and Telnet exposure | Binwalk IDA Pro Wireshark | University at Albany

new.name: Exploit-Dirty-Cow
new.description: Privilege escalation lab reproducing the DirtyCow kernel exploit (CVE-2016-5195) in a controlled environment. Includes vulnerable setup, exploit execution, privilege escalation to root, and mitigation analysis.

new.name: Escalamiento-de-Privilegios-usando-el-Kernel-Exploit-Dirty-Cow
new.description: Este proyecto tiene como objetivo demostrar de forma práctica el funcionamiento del exploit Dirty COW (CVE-2016-5195), una vulnerabilidad crítica del en el kernel de Linux. Se simula un escenario realista en el que un atacante con acceso local limitado a un sistema sin parchear logra escalar sus privilegios hasta obtener acceso completo como root.

new.name: cow
new.description: 🐮 Interact with a local AI language model, reasoning and using tools, all from your terminal—free and easy to install.

new.name: CVE-2026-46331
new.description: CVE-2026-46331 act_pedit page-cache corruption exploit, with Alpine PIE fix

new.name: CVE-2026-59734-POC
new.description: OS Command Injection in Health Check → Remote Code Execution

new.description: Instant Appointment <= 1.2 — Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload to RCE via add_service_front AJAX | CVSS 9.8

update.name: CVE-2022-0847
update.description: CVE-2022-0847-DirtyPipe-Exploit   CVE-2022-0847 是存在于 Linux内核 5.8 及之后版本中的本地提权漏洞。攻击者通过利用此漏洞，可覆盖重写任意可读文件中的数据，从而可将普通权限的用户提升到特权 root。    CVE-2022-0847 的漏洞原理类似于 CVE-2016-5195 脏牛漏洞（Dirty Cow），但它更容易被利用。漏洞作者将此漏洞命名为“Dirty Pipe”
